description: Make compiler2/types self-contained. erase_nominal and value_disjoint (descr.rs:496) read the brand/opaque inner from the symbol own structural axes instead of the name-keyed nominals.brand_inners/opaque_inners maps; remove the discarded-inner plumbing. The shared Types trait keeps its Nominals-bearing methods for the legacy ConcreteTypes impl; compiler2 conforms reading-from-symbol -- there is no live compiler2 pipeline caller of value_disjoint to break. Verify: compiler2 nominal conformance tests rewritten to the mint_brand arrangement; value_disjoint_soundness_table green.
title: Inner-in-symbol in compiler2/types; drop the Nominals leak from compiler2 use
